mainEntity.name: How to measure ROI from LA AI visibility investments?
mainEntity.text: How to measure ROI from LA AI visibility investments?

acceptedAnswer.text: Track AI citations (queries/month), lead forms from AI traffic, client attribution surveys. Target 5x ROI in 6 months.

suggestedAnswer.text: LA firms use Google Analytics UTM for AI referrals, query logs for citations. Survey 'How found us?' 20% AI-driven. Benchmark: $10k spend = $50k fees. Adjust quarterly. Insurers ignore unproven firms.

name: Measuring LA AI Visibility ROI
description: Track AI citations (queries/month), lead forms from AI traffic, client attribution surveys. Target 5x ROI in 6 months.
